name: dstack
description: dstack is an open-source control plane for running development, training, and inference jobs on GPUs—across hyperscalers, neoclouds, or on-prem.
summaryZh: dstack is an open-source control plane for running development, training, and inference jobs on GPUs—across hyperscalers, neoclouds, or on-prem. 它更偏底层推理和服务基础设施，适合关注性能、成本和部署效率。
whyItMatters: 最近仍在高频更新，仓库成熟度和社区基础都不错。
fitFor: 适合做推理服务、模型部署、性能优化的工程团队。
